title: Aluminium Hat & Coat Double Hook Hanger – 125mm – 5 Pack
features: Pack of 5 125mm aluminium double hook hanger
Ideal for: Hanging coats, hats and robes
These hooks can be easily fixed into either a wall, door or you can pre-mount it onto a wooden rail
Perfect for homes, schools, pubs, clubs and offices
description: These aluminium hat and coat hooks are used in commercial buildings, as well as residential properties. This product is ideal for homes, schools, pubs, clubs and offices. The hooks can be simply face fixed directly to either a wall or your door, or they can be pre-mounted on a wooden rail. This product comes in a satin anodized aluminium finish. Each hook is 125mm long.
